{{Infobox character
| name = Farstrider sisters
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Azea]] and [[Calazan Farstrider]] are [[Izyrian]] twins who serve as the dual leaders of the [[Witness Guild]]. Characterized by their tall, slender builds and pale hair, the sisters are nearly indistinguishable from one another. As [[Silent Ones]], they do not speak in the presence of outsiders and typically keep their mouths covered, though they carry candles at their waists. They are highly influential figures whose impartial reports on significant [[Imperial]] events possess the power to sway public opinion throughout the [[Empire]]. There is speculation that the sisters share a singular soul or have linked their minds through supernatural means, as they often act in unison and maintain intense, synchronized focus.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Farstrider sisters]] can follow the fight despite the noise.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstrider sisters]] provide accurate, impartial descriptions of important events in [[Imperial]] history.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstrider sisters]] are a group of individuals.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstrider sisters]] are seen peeking over the side of a wagon.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Farstrider sisters]] sat at the far end of the table.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
